name: Strategy handoff drafts first content
description: Verify that a marketer can enter the strategy co-creation wizard from Home, refine the draft, lock the strategy, and see first content drafted from it.

planSteps.description: If the strategy wizard is not already visible, click the "New campaign from an idea" entry on Home.
Verify that the strategy co-creation wizard is visible with the heading "Let's think your strategy through".
In the idea textarea, enter: "I built an AI tool that verifies AI-generated code before teams ship it."
Click the "Think it through" button and wait for the strategy draft to finish loading.
Verify that the generated draft shows "What I heard", "Who it's really for", "Angles to stand out", "Content pillars", and "How we'll know it's working" sections.
Verify that at least one audience candidate and at least one positioning angle are visible.
Enter feedback: "Focus on engineering managers who need confidence before merging AI-authored pull requests."
Click "Refine with this" and wait for the refined strategy draft.
Verify that the page shows the "How we got here" loop history and includes the submitted feedback.
Click "Lock it → draft my first content" and wait for the AI team handoff to complete.
Verify that the page confirms the strategy was locked.
Verify that a "First content" section appears with at least one drafted content item.
